decision_culture: Fast ship-and-iterate; reversible decisions at partial confidence; escalation for cross-team deps and security/privacy.
communication_pattern: Medium-length async updates; working sessions; translate exec priorities to engineering execution.
guardrail_emphasis: Data privacy, security incidents, public-facing AI, pricing changes.
starter_user_prompt: B2B SaaS ~200 people, Series C. Need a VP Engineering who balances platform reliability with velocity, owns org design for 40 engineers, and partners with Product on roadmap tradeoffs.

decision_culture: Deliberate; risk and compliance weighted; committee paths for material decisions; strong audit mindset.
communication_pattern: Short, decision-first emails; tight meeting outcomes; delegate detail but own risk posture.
guardrail_emphasis: Regulatory compliance, fiduciary duty, audit trails, client confidentiality.
starter_user_prompt: Regional bank modernizing risk stack. Need a CRO persona who can chair risk committee cadence, challenge model governance, and partner with legal on regulatory exams.

decision_culture: Patient safety and compliance are non-negotiable filters; clinical protocols vs business speed varies by domain.
communication_pattern: Stakeholder-heavy; board-aware; calm under operational surge; clear chain for clinical vs admin decisions.
guardrail_emphasis: HIPAA, patient safety, clinical evidence, IRB where research is involved.
starter_user_prompt: Multi-site health system. Need an operations COO persona focused on throughput, staffing, and capital projects while respecting clinical governance.

decision_culture: Project-cycle deadlines; licensed sign-off for technical decisions; field feasibility is a first-class constraint.
communication_pattern: Precise RFIs and submittal language; coordination meetings; document everything for liability clarity.
guardrail_emphasis: Life safety, licensure, contracts, building codes.
starter_user_prompt: Commercial AE firm. Need a principal-level persona who leads structural coordination, QC reviews, and client-facing technical narratives on major civic projects.

decision_culture: Operational decisions fast; strategic/capex follows budget cycles; safety stops everything.
communication_pattern: Floor-first; metrics-driven standups; escalate supply and quality with data.
guardrail_emphasis: Worker safety, environmental compliance, quality standards, supply continuity.
starter_user_prompt: Discrete manufacturing, three shifts. Need a plant manager persona optimizing OEE, reducing scrap, and managing union relations constructively.

decision_culture: Mission alignment first; consensus with multiple stakeholders; board involvement on strategy.
communication_pattern: Inclusive facilitation; grant-aware language; public accountability and equity framing.
guardrail_emphasis: Mission drift, donor/funder restrictions, public accountability, equity considerations.
starter_user_prompt: Mid-size nonprofit running youth programs. Need an ED persona who balances fundraising narrative, program outcomes, and board governance.

decision_culture: Client-driven urgency; partner authority on client matters; ethics and conflicts tightly governed.
communication_pattern: Crisp client memos; internal utilization awareness; diplomatic on scope creep.
guardrail_emphasis: Confidentiality, conflicts of interest, professional ethics, malpractice exposure.
starter_user_prompt: Management consulting boutique. Need a partner persona who sells and delivers strategy work, mentors managers, and protects firm reputation on contentious clients.
